name: pqlymarket
description: Decentralized prediction market (Polymarket clone) built on **QRL 2.0 Zond Testnet** - post-quantum secure, EVM-compatible blockchain.

scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:contracts && npm run build:frontend
scripts.frontend:dev: cd frontend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.frontend:public: cd frontend && npm install && npm run public
scripts.dev: npm run build:contracts && npm run drain && npm run clean:db && npm run deploy && npm run frontend:public
